sizing_rule.note: Start with optimal f calculation. If leverage ratio exceeds 2.0, iteratively reduce position size by dividing optimal f dollar amount by 3 or 4 (scale_down_multiplier ≈ 0.25–0.33) until leverage ≤ 2.0. Include non-interest-bearing cash allocation in final portfolio. Vince's risk management via fractional optimal f.

source_rule_text: Divide optimal f in dollars by 3 or 4 until achieving an optimal portfolio that includes a percentage allocation to non-interest-bearing cash, avoiding leverage ratios higher than 2.
